prompt: Draft a worksheet introduction for ordering food in a Lisbon café — A1 European Portuguese. Include a short dialogue (4-6 lines). Output as plain markdown to outputs/worksheet.md.

assertions.text: Is European Portuguese: uses 'queria' (and/or 'era') as the polite request form, NOT 'gostaria' (BP) or 'quereria' (textbook EP nobody uses)
No BP forms slip in: no você (as the subject pronoun), no gerúndio for ongoing action (estar a + inf is EP)
All non-cognate Portuguese words are translated to English
Uses 'Estudante' / 'Data' headers (worksheet conventions per project), or at least Portuguese cognate headers (not 'Student' / 'Date')
No fake accents on Portuguese words (real spellings only)
Generic learner audience — no specific roster student name (Marvin, Christian, Amanda, etc.)
Lisbon-specific vocabulary present (bica, galão, pastel de nata, se faz favor) and explained
